trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: switch the admin test-account workflow fixtures from the alpha-only placeholder requirement (req-alpha-proposal) to the seeded framework requirement ID (req-proposal-draft).
scope: Replace the alpha-only placeholder requirement fixture with the seeded framework requirement ID in the admin test-account seed endpoint, update conflict-upsert behavior so reseeding migrates existing alpha submission/progress rows, and refresh catalog/backlog/log evidence.
changes: Updated functions/api/admin/test-accounts.ts to seed requirements/progress/submission fixtures using req-proposal-draft and proposal-and-research instead of req-alpha-proposal.
Updated the test-account fixture upserts so reseeding updates requirement_id and phase on existing alpha progress/submission rows.
Updated tests/test-account-seed.test.mjs and docs/artifacts.json to match the seeded requirement fixture id.
Updated docs/mvp-requirements-catalog.md, docs/automation-backlog.md, docs/automation-memory.md, and docs/progress/run-log.md with the new MVP-009 fixture evidence.
known_limits: Cloudflare Pages deploys do not auto-apply D1 migrations; a follow-on pass still needs Wrangler to apply migrations (including 0002 + 0003) to local/remote D1 and verify row counts by query.
Remote D1 instances that were seeded earlier may still contain the req-alpha-proposal placeholder rows until a reseed/migration pass is completed.
next_actions: Apply migrations locally: npm run db:migrate:local (or npx wrangler d1 migrations apply senior-capstone-db --local).
Apply migrations remotely: npm run db:migrate:remote (or npx wrangler d1 migrations apply senior-capstone-db --remote).
Verify seeded counts by query (requirements, deadlines, quality_checks, requirement_sections).
Re-run POST /api/admin/test-accounts in preview/production to migrate the existing alpha fixtures to req-proposal-draft and confirm no flows still reference req-alpha-proposal.
